description: Write and execute a Python script to import access control events from /home/ga/Documents/acs_exceptions.csv into Nx Witness VMS (https://localhost:7001) as bookmarks using credentials admin / Admin1234!. For each row in the CSV, create a bookmark on the camera matching 'Camera Name'. The bookmark name must be the 'Event Type', the description must be formatted as 'User: [User]', and the ISO 8601 timestamp and 'Duration_Sec' must be converted to milliseconds for the start time and duration.
